sql.if: and ( (a.match_credit_flg = true and s.business_type_dcsx in ('DCSXBL','DCSX','DCSXHDFK','BL','PT','HDFK')) or a.match_credit_flg = false)
and ( a.match_credit_flg = true and s.business_type_dcsx in ('DCSXBL','DCSX','DCSXHDFK','BL','PT','HDFK'))
and ( (a.match_credit_flg = true and s.business_type_dcsx in ('BL','PT','HDFK')) or a.match_credit_flg = false)
and ( (a.match_credit_flg = true and s.business_type_dcsx in ('DCSXBL','DCSX','DCSXHDFK')) or a.match_credit_flg = false)
and ( a.sell_contract_no like CONCAT('%',#{contractNo},'%') or a.buy_contract_no like CONCAT('%',#{contractNo},'%') )

if.test: level != null and level != '' and level.toString() == '3'.toString()

sql.if: and ( a.product_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{productsNameOne},'%') and a.brand_number LIKE CONCAT('%',#{productsNameTwo},'%') and a.factory_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{productsNameThree},'%') )

if.test: level != null and level != '' and level.toString() == '2'.toString()

sql.if: and ( (a.product_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{productsNameOne},'%') and a.brand_number LIKE CONCAT('%',#{productsNameTwo},'%')) or (a.brand_number LIKE CONCAT('%',#{productsNameOne},'%') and a.factory_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{productsNameTwo},'%')) )

if.test: level != null and level != '' and level.toString() == '1'.toString()

sql.if: and ( a.product_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{productsNameOne},'%') or a.brand_number LIKE CONCAT('%',#{productsNameOne},'%') or a.factory_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{productsNameOne},'%') )

mapper.select:
select CONCAT(a.product_name,'/',a.brand_number,'/',a.factory_name) productsName, a.sell_contract_id, a.sell_contract_no, a.buy_contract_id, a.buy_contract_no, a.contract_time, a.status settlementStatus, a.deal_number, a.sell_price, a.buy_price, if(a.print_amount is null ,0,a.print_amount) printAmount, a.insurance_rate, a.enterprise_id, a.delivery_time, a.pay_full_time, a.real_pay_full_time, a.receive_date, a.appoint_pay_date, a.confirm_receipt_date, a.settlement_date, a.receive_bill_date, a.summary_date, a.buy_company_id, a.buy_company_name, a.sell_company_id, a.sell_company_name, a.buy_our_company_name, a.sell_our_company_name, a.buy_match_user_id, a.buy_match_user_name, a.sell_match_user_id, a.sell_match_user_name, a.delivery_fee, a.breach_day, a.breach_amount, a.credit_cycle, a.business_type, a.match_credit_flg, a.buy_total_amount, a.sell_total_amount, a.transport_amount, a.warehouse_amount, if(a.vat_amount is null ,0,a.vat_amount) vatAmount, if(a.financial_service_amount is null ,0,a.financial_service_amount) financialServiceAmount, a.vat_spread_amount, if(a.surcharge_amount is null ,0,a.surcharge_amount) surchargeAmount, a.taxes_surcharges_amount, if(a.after_tax_spread_amount is null ,0,a.after_tax_spread_amount) afterTaxSpreadAmount, a.sell_head_user_id, a.sell_head_commission_amount, a.buy_head_user_id, a.buy_head_commission_amount, a.sell_match_amount, a.buy_match_amount, a.receive_flg, a.confirm_flg, a.bill_flg, a.settlement_code, a.created_date, a.updated_date, a.breach_rate, a.settle_status, a.settle_total_flg, a.approve_id, a.approve_no, a.dept_id, a.dept_name, ifNULL(b.transport_amount,0) + ifNULL(s.transport_amount,0) transportAmount, ifNULL(b.warehouse_amount,0) + ifNULL(s.warehouse_amount,0) warehouseAmount, ifNULL(b.delivery_fee,0) + ifNULL(s.delivery_fee,0) deliveryFee, ifNULL(b.stevedorage,0) + ifNULL(s.stevedorage,0) stevedorage, s.total_amount*(if(s.insurance_rate is null,0,s.insurance_rate)) insuranceAmount from t_ctr_contract_settlement a INNER JOIN t_ctr_contract b ON a.buy_contract_id = b.id INNER JOIN t_ctr_contract s on a.sell_contract_id = s.id
a.enable_flg = TRUE and s.business_type = 'ZY-BB' AND b.seal_flg = TRUE AND s.seal_flg = TRUE AND b.status != 'C' AND s.status != 'C'
order by a.contract_time desc

select sum(a.deal_number) dealNumber, sum(a.buy_price) / count(a.id) buyPrice, sum(a.sell_price) / count(a.id) sellPrice, sum(a.buy_total_amount) buyTotalAmount, sum(a.sell_total_amount) sellTotalAmount, sum(a.financial_service_amount) financialServiceAmount, sum(a.vat_amount) vatAmount, sum(a.surcharge_amount) surchargeAmount, sum(a.print_amount) as printAmount, sum(a.after_tax_spread_amount) as afterTaxSpreadAmount, sum(ifNULL(b.transport_amount,0) + ifNULL(s.transport_amount,0)) transportAmount, sum(ifNULL(b.warehouse_amount,0) + ifNULL(s.warehouse_amount,0)) warehouseAmount, sum(ifNULL(b.delivery_fee,0) + ifNULL(s.delivery_fee,0)) deliveryFee, sum(ifNULL(b.stevedorage,0) + ifNULL(s.stevedorage,0)) stevedorage, sum(s.total_amount*(if(s.insurance_rate is null,0,s.insurance_rate))) insuranceAmount from t_ctr_contract_settlement a INNER JOIN t_ctr_contract b ON a.buy_contract_id = b.id INNER JOIN t_ctr_contract s on a.sell_contract_id = s.id
a.enable_flg = TRUE and s.business_type = 'ZY-BB' AND b.seal_flg = TRUE AND s.seal_flg = TRUE AND b.status != 'C' AND s.status != 'C'
order by a.contract_time desc

select
sum( if(buy_match_user_id = #{currentUserId}, ifnull(buy_match_amount, 0), 0) + if(sell_match_user_id = #{currentUserId}, ifnull(sell_match_amount, 0), 0) + if(sell_head_user_id = #{currentUserId}, ifnull(sell_head_commission_amount, 0), 0) + if(buy_head_user_id = #{currentUserId}, ifnull(buy_head_commission_amount, 0), 0) ) money,
sum( ifnull(buy_match_amount, 0) + ifnull(sell_match_amount, 0) + ifnull(sell_head_commission_amount, 0) + ifnull(buy_head_commission_amount, 0) ) money,
'累计未结算提成' typeName,
'预计提成' typeName,
'上个月结算提成' typeName,
count(*) num
from t_ctr_contract_settlement where receive_flg = true and confirm_flg = true and bill_flg = true and settle_status is not null and date_format(summary_date, '%Y-%m') = #{dayOrMonth}
and (buy_head_user_id = #{currentUserId} or sell_match_user_id = #{currentUserId} or sell_head_user_id = #{currentUserId} or buy_match_user_id = #{currentUserId})
and settle_status = #{settleStatus}
